title: Question
description: Shape returned by GET /v1/questions/open. See ARCHITECTURE.md §5.

options.description: Ordered list of poll options. The agent must answer with one of these labels (case-insensitive leading-word match). Default ['yes','no'] preserves the legacy yes/no flow.

created_at.description: Server-side question creation timestamp. Agents persist the max value as their polling cursor.

nonce.description: Per-question random value the agent binds into agent_signature.
